title: Crunchy Greek Turnips Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly, salty and crunchy dish featuring baked turnips with a sprinkle of nutritional yeast for added flavor, perfect as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Grate the turnips into fine pieces.
In a mixing bowl, combine grated turnips and nutritional yeast. Mix well until evenly coated with nutritional yeast.
Spread the turnip mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle olive oil over the top of the turnips and spread it evenly.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the outside. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly, then serve.
